title: A Historical Review of Cryogenic Mechanical Testing in Type 304 Stainless Steels - State of the Art and Current Outlooks
description: Of the austenitic stainless steels, Type 304 has become ubiquitous throughout industry.
text:
Derimow, N. , Benzing, J. and Weeks, T. (2025), A Historical Review of Cryogenic Mechanical Testing in Type 304 Stainless Steels – State of the Art and Current Outlooks, Cryogenics, [online], https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cryogenics.2025.104105, https://tsapps.nist.gov/publication/get_pdf.cfm?pub_id=959555 (Accessed March 1, 2026)
